Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Conchita Lozana-Batista, Esq. 510-337-1001 of Weinberg Roger & Rosenfeld for PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS
No other appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioner Northern California District Council of Laborers' petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order/judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
